title: Preserve Email Chain for Sequences

posts.author: MaraDuca (Mara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to request that, in sequences, when the first email is a manual email, the following automatic emails will include that first manual email in the thread. This way, the recipient will have all of the emails in one chain rather than starting a brand new chain thereafter.

What are you trying to achieve

To be able to keep email chain together when enrolling contacts in a sequence.

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mara!
That’s a really useful feature idea - keeping all the emails in a sequence within a single thread would make communication much clearer for recipients.

However, if you’re looking for more control over how emails are handled inside monday, you might want to check out our Email to Tasks for monday.com. It won’t merge emails into one thread, but it does give you more flexibility in selectively managing which emails become tasks on your boards.

I’ll also note your request as valuable feedback for future improvements in email workflows.
